theme_and_archetype.name: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Soft Utility
theme_and_archetype.description: A calm, proactive AI growth mentor. The aesthetic is lightweight, clean, and modern. Light mode uses warm off-white/ivory backgrounds with a carefully calibrated saffron/mustard yellow accent to avoid eye strain. Dark mode relies on deep slate/charcoal for a modern AI tool feel. It avoids the generic ChatGPT clone look by introducing elegant typography and spacious journaling layouts.

headings.usage: Auth pages, Dashboard section titles, Sidebar headers, empty states.

body.usage: UI elements, buttons, sidebar links, settings, charts.

journal.usage: Immersive 'Guinevere Journal' chat area, markdown rendered history, AI mentor responses.

rules: Never center text by default. Define explicit alignment (mostly left-aligned).
Use Lora (serif) for the actual chat messages and journal entries to give 'Guinevere' a distinct, mentor-like personality.
Use Outfit for application structural headings (Dashboard, Settings).

general: Use generative spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12). Avoid cramped layouts.
Max width for the Guinevere Journal chat area is max-w-3xl to ensure comfortable reading of markdown content.

sidebar.behavior: Fixed on desktop, hidden behind a hamburger on mobile (use Sheet component).

dashboard_grid.cards: Subtle roundness (rounded-xl), 1px solid border (border), minimal shadow (shadow-sm). Use flat cards, not glass.

chat_area.layout: Flex column, scrollable message area, fixed bottom input.
chat_area.user_bubble: Align right, bg-primary/10 (light) or bg-primary/20 (dark), text-foreground, rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm.
chat_area.ai_bubble: Align left, bg-card, border border-border, rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm, font-journal.

components.buttons: Shadcn standard. Primary buttons use the Warm Yellow (primary) with Dark text. Never use yellow for secondary actions.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard. Focus state must use ring-primary.
components.cards: Shadcn standard. Use pure white (light) or lighter slate (dark) to contrast against the main background.
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn charts. Primary data series must use the primary yellow color. Secondary data uses muted grays.
components.tables: For Journal History. Clean rows, border-b only, hover state: bg-muted/50.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and interactive cards must have -translate-y-[1px] and slight shadow increase on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for color and transform changes.
motion_and_interactions.chat_stream: Ensure typing indicators and streamed messages do not cause layout thrashing. Keep the input bar locked at the bottom.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text on primary (yellow) buttons MUST be dark (foreground) for APCA/WCAG compliance.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, sidebar items) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-chat-link').
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All focusable elements must have visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary).

empty_state_background.description: Abstract warm sand background, use for auth screens or empty states with a soft overlay.

journal_cover_placeholder.description: Minimalist gratitude journal on grey background, use for Journal History empty state or banner.

brand_icon.description: Minimalist elegant logo icon, use as placeholder for Guinevere brand logo in sidebar.

iconography: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Keep icon stroke-width to 1.5 for a clean, sophisticated look.
